message:
feat(runtime): add telemetry schema module and expand subscription engine (+107 lines)

- telemetry_schema.rs: new module defining structured telemetry event types
- subscription.rs: +40 lines extending event pipeline with telemetry hooks
- Expand seed RPC and integration tests, update runtime lib wiring
- Sync beads tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
